summary: Updated implementation plan incorporating strict Error-First philosophy: no fallbacks between niches, early termination with clear error logs when pipeline components don't match. Covers 5 components with explicit niche validation gates at each pipeline step. Key changes from v1: all fallback logic replaced with RuntimeError + descriptive log messages, niche-aware dispatch maps made mandatory (not optional), _extract_chapter_blueprint requires explicit niche field config, _build_excerpt requires explicit niche field registration, validate_phase_plan_sub_keys requires niche param and matching prompt file.
